name: statflo-ruflo-bot
description: Playwright automation for Statflo outreach — 1st/2nd/3rd Attempt smart lists

scripts.dashboard: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,blue "node ui/server/index.js" "cd ui/client && npm run dev"
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT,ELECTRON -c green,blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "node ui/server/index.js" "cd ui/client && npm run dev" "cd desktop && npm run dev"
